summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vastu Blueprint MVP - AI-powered floor plan generation with Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration working excellently. All core features functional including plot input, floor plan generation, Vastu scoring, cost estimation, and AI copilot.

ui_bugs.issue: Send button occasionally blocked by toast notifications and overlays

passed_tests: AI floor plan generation with Claude Sonnet 4.5
Plot input form with all required fields
2D floor plan canvas with 15 room blocks
Vastu score calculation (70/100 with detailed room scores)
Tab switching between Floor Plan and Cost Estimate
Cost estimation with complete BOQ (₹33.25L for 1847 sq.ft)
AI Copilot interface and quick actions
